_comment: Round-253 bilingual fixtures for Config. Used by config_describe_challenge.sh + challenges/runner/main.go to verify UTF-8 / non-ASCII text round-trips losslessly through config.SaveFile -> LoadFile, env.Load, and storageconfig Marshal/Unmarshal paths. CONST-046 alignment (no hardcoded English-only assumption).

expected_invariants.json_round_trip: config.SaveFile then LoadFile MUST preserve every byte of non-ASCII text without modification
expected_invariants.env_binding: env.Load MUST honour the default tag and override from process env without dropping non-ASCII bytes
expected_invariants.storage_marshal: storageconfig.MarshalConfig + Unmarshal* MUST round-trip non-ASCII names through every protocol struct
expected_invariants.validator_runs: validator.Validate MUST treat non-ASCII strings as legitimate values (Required + MinLength on rune-aware semantics)
